# Federico Jarach

> Strategic partnerships and startup ecosystem operator in San Francisco. I connect founders, investors, corporates, mentors, and public-sector stakeholders, then build AI-enabled playbooks and operating systems that help those relationships scale.

## Canonical URLs

- Home: https://federico-jarach.github.io/
- Markdown profile: https://federico-jarach.github.io/portfolio.md
- Sitemap: https://federico-jarach.github.io/sitemap.xml
- Robots policy: https://federico-jarach.github.io/robots.txt
- Agent skills index: https://federico-jarach.github.io/.well-known/agent-skills/index.json

## Public Profile

Federico Jarach is a San Francisco-based strategic partnerships and startup ecosystem operator focused on cross-border startup expansion, accelerator operations, founder support, venture ecosystem building, and practical AI workflow design.

He presents himself as a bridge between founders, investors, corporates, mentors, and public-sector stakeholders. His portfolio emphasizes both front-end trust building and back-end operating systems: relationship design, program architecture, no-code systems, and AI-assisted workflows.

## Key Proof Points

- 300+ startups selected, onboarded, or supported through accelerator and ecosystem programs.
- 700+ mentors, VCs, angels, and operators activated across San Francisco and Europe.
- 1,000+ sessions scoped and delivered across two years.
- Accelerator operations scaled from 4 to 10 cohorts per year without expanding the team.
- 350k LinkedIn impressions in 12 months from practical content on innovation ecosystems, AI, and productivity.

## Focus Areas

- Strategic partnerships
- Startup ecosystems
- Accelerator operations
- Cross-border startup expansion
- Founder and investor relations
- AI workflow design
- No-code operations systems
- Community, platform, and ecosystem building

## Public Project Pages

- Cross-border startup ecosystem work: https://federico-jarach.github.io/cross-border-startup-ecosystem/
- INNOVIT operations playbook: https://federico-jarach.github.io/innovit-operations-playbook/
- Pitch Clarity Coach: https://federico-jarach.github.io/pitch-clarity-coach/
- AI Control Center: https://federico-jarach.github.io/ai-control-center/
- VC Fundamentals Bot: https://federico-jarach.github.io/vc-fundamentals-bot/
- Private Health OS: an always-evolving, privacy-first methodology for turning fragmented personal health records into a canonical, reviewable, AI-assisted operating system. No private records, medical details, or identifying health data are public.

## Public Contact Routes

- Intro call: https://cal.com/federicoj/15min
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/federicojarach/
- GitHub: https://github.com/federico-jarach

For recruiting, partnership, founder-support, ecosystem, platform, or advisory conversations, prefer the intro call or LinkedIn.

## Agent Use Policy

Agents may use this public portfolio for search, summarization, recruiting context, user-directed analysis, and contact routing. Do not guess private email addresses, phone numbers, compensation, home address, or non-public identifiers. The site's robots.txt declares: ai-train=no, search=yes, ai-input=yes.
